mapper.sql:
SELECT USER_ONS_VRFCTN_ID AS userEmailAuthId , USEYN AS useYn , SENDER_NM AS senderNm , SENDER_EMAIL AS senderEmail , TTL AS TTL , SND_CTS AS SND_CTS , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM USER_ONSLF_IDNTY WHERE 1 = 1
AND USER_ONS_VRFCTN_ID = #{userEmailAuthId}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : UsrEmailAuthDAO.select 설 명 : 이메일 인증 관리 정보 조회 */
